validated_quotes.direct_quote: Abstract Expressionism had a profound impact on the development of modern and contemporary art, and its influence can still be seen in many art movements that followed.
Shillong Autumn Festival: This festival is held in October-November and celebrates the harvest season. Tourists can expect cultural performances, traditional food, and handicraft exhibitions.

Cherry Blossom Festival: Held in November-December, this festival celebrates the blooming of cherry blossoms in Shillong. There are cultural shows, food stalls, and art exhibitions during this festival.

Nongkhnum River Festival: This festival is held in December-January and celebrates the river ecosystem of Shillong. Tourists can expect kayaking, fishing, and boat races, as well as cultural performances and food stalls.
Shad Suk Mynsiem: This is a traditional festival held in April-May and celebrates the harvest season. Tourists can expect traditional dances, music, and rituals during this festival.
the drum and dance competition attracts the largest crowds and is considered the highlight of a powwow.
